PowerShell(Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { node "E:\\nobl-dashboard\\server\\index.js" 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Receive-Job $job; $job | Remove-Job -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c cd /d E:\\nobl-dashboard && node server\\index.js > data\\server.log 2> data\\server2.err" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; "Process ID: $\($proc.Id\)"; "Process exited: $\($proc.HasExited\)"; Get-Content "E:\\nobl-dashboard\\data\\server.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "---ERR---"; Get-Content "E:\\nobl-dashboard\\data\\server2.err" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { "Killing PID: $\($_.Id\)"; $_ | Stop-Process -Force }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count)

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c cd /d E:\\nobl-dashboard && node server\\index.js > data\\server.log 2> data\\server2.err" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; "Process ID: $\($proc.Id\)"; "Process exited: $\($proc.HasExited\)"; Get-Content "E:\\nobl-dashboard\\data\\server.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "---TAIL ERR---"; Get-Content "E:\\nobl-dashboard\\data\\server2.err" -Tail 5 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c cd /d E:\\nobl-dashboard && node server\\index.js > data\\server.log 2> data\\server2.err" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; "PID: $\($proc.Id\) | Exited: $\($proc.HasExited\)"; Get-Content "E:\\nobl-dashboard\\data\\server.log")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/sheets/Summary" -UseBasicParsing; $j=$r.Content|ConvertFrom-Json; "Summary: $\($j.rows.Count\) rows"; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/sheets/Trial%20to%20Paid%20Daily%20break%20down" -UseBasicParsing; $j2=$r2.Content|ConvertFrom-Json; "Trial Daily: $\($j2.rows.Count\) rows / $\($j2.headers.Count\) cols")

PowerShell($tabs=@\("Summary","Daily%20Input","Trial%20to%20Paid","By%20Channel","FB%20Campaigns","Trial%20to%20Paid%20Daily%20break%20down","Data%20Map"\); foreach\($t in $tabs\){ try{ $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/api/sheets/$t" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; $j=$r.Content|ConvertFrom-Json; "[$t] rows=$\($j.rows.Count\) cols=$\($j.headers.Count\)" }catch{ "[$t] ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
